summary: Backend testing of Mechanic App APIs - Seed Test Data, Dev Mechanic Auth, and Inspections API. All 11 tests passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Seed test data endpoint correctly prevents duplicates by checking car_number and city combination
Dev mechanic auth flow properly handles special test phone 9611188788 with OTP 123456
API response correctly includes latitude, longitude, and customerAddress for map navigation
Field mapping between backend and frontend Inspection interface is correct
seed_data_creation: Test data seeded via POST /api/mechanic/seed-test-data - creates 6 test inspections in Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai with statuses NEW, ACCEPTED, COMPLETED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mechanic App backend APIs fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/mechanic/seed-test-data (creates test inspections), POST /api/auth/request-otp (dev phone 9611188788), POST /api/auth/verify-otp (OTP 123456), GET /api/mechanic/inspections (returns inspections with correct fields including latitude, longitude, customerAddress for map navigation). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mechanic_seed_and_inspections.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.POST /api/mechanic/seed-test-data: PASS - Creates 6 test inspections in 3 cities with 3 statuses
features_tested.POST /api/auth/request-otp (dev phone): PASS - Returns success for dev mechanic phone 9611188788
features_tested.POST /api/auth/verify-otp (dev OTP): PASS - Returns valid token and mechanicProfile with inspection_cities
features_tested.GET /api/mechanic/inspections: PASS - Returns inspections with all required fields
features_tested.GET /api/mechanic/inspections?status=X: PASS - Status filter works for NEW, ACCEPTED, COMPLETED
features_tested.Navigation fields (lat/lng/address): PASS - All inspections have latitude, longitude, and customerAddress
features_tested.Frontend interface compatibility: PASS - API response matches Inspection interface
